POS; AFFIDAVIT RE : NTC OF OPPOSITION TO PETITION TO CONFIRM ARB. AWARD FILED BY THIRD PARTY LYDDON, GRANT S

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER DOROTHY S. LYDDON TRUST'S (OF JULY 7,1975 BY ALVIN LEVITT) PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. ARBITRATION AWARD CONFIRMED. THE OPPOSITION FAILS TO PRESENT ANY COMPREHENSIBLE LEGAL BASIS NOT TO CONFIRM THE AWARD. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189

calendar.matters:
(Re-Notice) Of Hrg On Petition To Confirm Arb
Off Calendar May-15-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES- ATTY. RICHARD J. COLLIER OF TITCHELL, MALTZMAN, MARK & OHLEYER, TEL. NO. 392-5600 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
GRANT S. LYDDON, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PROPER.

RULING- THE CASE WAS CALLED THE SECOND TIME AROUND BECAUSE MR. LYDDON CAME LATE AND THE COURT HAD ALREADY SIGNED AN ORDER IN THIS CASE. DEFENDANT ALSO FAILED TO NOTIFY THE OTHER SIDE THAT HE WILL APPEAR AND CONTEST THE TENTATIVE RULING. AFTER HEARING FROM THE DEFENDANT, THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS -PETITIONER DOROTHY S. LYDDON TRUST OF JULY 7,1975, BY, ALVIN LEVITT (Re-Notice) Of Hrg On Petition To Confirm Arbitration IS GRANTED. ARBITRATION AWARD CONFIRMED. THE OPPOSITION FAILS TO PRESENT ANY COMPREHENSIBLE LEGAL BASIS NOT TO CONFIRM THE AWARD. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB/JF.

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Mar-06-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PETITIONER DOROTHY S. LYDDON TRUST OF JULY 7,1975, BY, ALVIN LEVITT Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award IS OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189
